arts.ttl: How the first game of every Man United manager since Sir Alex Ferguson went as Ruben Amorim gets set for Red Devils' debut - from Erik ten Hag's Brighton nightmare, to David Moyes' trophy-winning start and Ole Gunnar Solskjaer's Cardiff reunion
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will become the 10th manager to take charge of a Manchester United game in the last 11 years this weekend when the Red Devils face Ipswich in their Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Brighton, Ipswich join Southampton in race for 18-year-old Brazilian winger?
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion, Ipswich Town and Southampton are all reportedly considering a January swoop for Vasco da Gama youngster Rayan.

arts.ttl: Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler praises Andoni Iraola before Bournemouth clash - 'I've followed him'
arts.sum: Fabian Hurzeler praised the Bournemouth manager before the seagulls travel away to the Vitality Stadium this weekend.
